highlights.title: Smoother search and Ask
highlights.description: Library and reader search now have a dedicated clear button, separate from closing search, and the reader Ask panel opens and closes with an in-place morph that honors your reduced-motion setting.

highlights.title: Faster, steadier PDF resume
highlights.description: Opening a PDF returns to your last-read page faster, and jumping with the progress slider no longer gets interrupted by the old resume, so you land on the page you picked.

highlights.title: Library updates after distillation
highlights.description: Edit an article in a sedimentation window and the Library summary in the main window syncs right away, so you no longer see a stale title or content.

highlights.title: Steadier reading details
highlights.description: Fixed annotation-rail scrolling, web-translation drag selection, the discussion mention caret, and leftover reading memory after you delete an annotation or comment.
